content.problemStatement:
Chef's planet is called Javad. A year on Javad has NNN months numbered 111 through NNN. For each valid iii, the iii-th month has aia_iai‚Äã days numbered 111 through aia_iai‚Äã.

On Javad, years that are divisible by 444 are leap years - the last month of each leap year is one day longer (it has aN+1a_N + 1aN‚Äã+1 days).

You are given Chef's birth date and the current date. Find the age of Chef in days, i.e. the number of days between Chef's birth date and the current date inclusive.
constraints: dbd_bdb‚Äã will be less than or equal to the days of the mbm_bmb‚Äã month of the yby_byb‚Äã year.
dcd_cdc‚Äã will be less than or equal to the days of the mcm_cmc‚Äã month of the ycy_cyc‚Äã year.
the current date is equal to or greater than Chef's birth date
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a1,a2,‚Ä¶,aNa_1, a_2, \ldots, a_Na1‚Äã,a2‚Äã,‚Ä¶,aN‚Äã.
The third line contains three space-separated positive integers yby_byb‚Äã, mbm_bmb‚Äã and dbd_bdb‚Äã denoting the year, month and day of Chef's birth respectively.
The fourth line contains three space-separated positive integers ycy_cyc‚Äã, mcm_cmc‚Äã and dcd_cdc‚Äã denoting the current year, month and day respectively.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî Chef's age in days.
